title: The Problem Solvers | Max Junestrand at Legora
summary: Legora is an AI-native operating system that enables legal teams to autonomously plan, execute, review, and complete complex legal work end-to-end. Built with Anthropic's Claude, it aims to deliver significant improvements in legal work workflows as language models advance.
